MAESTRO-RESONANCE.description: At the end of your turn, deal X damage to all enemies and decrease this by 1.
MAESTRO-RESONANCE.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to all enemies and decrease this by [blue]{Decrease}[/blue].
MAESTRO-RESONANCE.title: Resonance
MAESTRO-PAGE_FLIP_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, draw 1 card.

MAESTRO-JAM_SESSION_POWER.description: At the start of every turn, add 1 Performer to your hand.

MAESTRO-ACCELERANDO_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card.

MAESTRO-SECTION_LEADER_POWER.description: Whenever you add a performer to your hand, upgrade it.
